description_long: This helmet features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly matte white exterior accented by dark gray and black structural elements. The surface is smooth with subtle weathering and scuff marks, suggesting use in urban or tactical environments. Large, dark-tinted side panels, possibly for visibility or ventilation, are integrated into the helmet's shell. The rear and lower sections are reinforced with angular, mechanical components, giving it a high-tech, protective appearance. The helmet displays the text 'assault HELMET' on one side, adding to its utilitarian aesthetic. There are no visible external straps or retention systems, and the overall form is compact and ergonomic.
description: A matte white, futuristic helmet with dark side panels, reinforced rear sections, and subtle text labeling. Its design is robust and high-tech, suitable for urban tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view shows a smooth, rounded faceplate with two large, dark side panels and a central, slightly weathered area.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the 'assault HELMET' text, a vented panel, and angular mechanical reinforcements at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the reinforced, angular back section and two prominent ventilation or design cutouts at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, with the text reversed and similar vent and reinforcement details.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large, elongated vents or cutouts on the upper rear sides, integrated into the helmet shell; no small or mesh vents visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Text label 'assault HELMET' on the side; otherwise plain with no additional graphics or motifs.
